fields.label: Home Title
fields.description: Overrides the display label for the home breadcrumb item. If blank, the page title is used.

fields.name: enableBreadcrumb

fields.description: Toggles rendering of the breadcrumb trail. Uncheck to hide the component output while retaining configuration.

fields.name: enableHiddenItems
fields.label: Enable Hidden Items
fields.description: When enabled, includes pages marked as hidden in navigation within the breadcrumb trail.

fields.name: enableCurrentPage
fields.label: Enable Current Page
fields.description: Controls whether the current page appears as the last item in the breadcrumb.

fields.name: enableRedirectTitle
fields.label: Enable Redirect Title
fields.description: Uses the redirect target page title if the page redirects; otherwise uses the page's own title.

fields.description: Specify which slide is initially active.

fields.name: blockId
fields.label: ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for this block

fields.name: classes_commonCustomClass
fields.label: Custom Class
fields.description: Custom CSS class to apply to this block

fields.name: analytics_id
fields.label: Analytics Interaction ID
fields.description: Analytics Interaction ID used for tracking interactions with this block.

fields.name: searchResultsPagePath
fields.label: Search Results Page Path
fields.description: Enter the path for the search results page.

fields.name: searchButtonPlaceholder
fields.label: Search Button Placeholder Text
fields.description: Placeholder text displayed on the search action/button in desktop and larger viewports. Optional; shown when no custom label is provided.

fields.name: searchButtonPlaceholderMobile
fields.label: Search Button Placeholder Text (Mobile View)
fields.description: Placeholder text for the search action/button optimized for mobile view. Optional; used when mobile-specific label differs from desktop.

fields.name: blockId
fields.label: ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for this block

fields.name: classes_commonCustomClass
fields.label: Custom Class
fields.description: Custom CSS class to apply to this block

fields.name: analytics_id
fields.label: Analytics Interaction ID
fields.description: Analytics Interaction ID used for tracking interactions with this block.

fields.name: blockId
fields.label: ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for this block

fields.name: classes_commonCustomClass
fields.label: Custom Class
fields.description: Custom CSS class to apply to this block

fields.name: analytics_id
fields.label: Analytics Interaction ID
fields.description: Analytics Interaction ID used for tracking interactions with this block.

fields.name: blockId
fields.label: ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for this block

fields.name: classes_commonCustomClass
fields.label: Custom Class
fields.description: Custom CSS class to apply to this block

fields.name: analytics_id
fields.label: Analytics Interaction ID
fields.description: Analytics Interaction ID used for tracking interactions with this block.

fields.name: id
fields.label: Id
fields.description: Provide an ID to be used to deep link to this content.
fields.tooltip: HTML ID attribute to apply to the component.

fields.name: classes
fields.label: Custom Class
fields.description: Provide a CSS class to customize this component.

fields.name: sourceLabel
fields.label: Source Label
fields.description: Provide label name for the stock. Example: "Source".
fields.tooltip: Provide label name for the stock.

fields.name: analyticsInteractionId
fields.label: Analytics Interaction ID
fields.description: Identifier used to track interactions for analytics reporting.

fields.name: storyCardVariant
fields.label: Story Card Type
fields.description: Select the card variant to apply different layouts and information display.

fields.name: hidePublicationDate
fields.label: Hide Publication Date
fields.description: If checked, suppresses the display of the publication date in the card layout.

fields.name: hideReadTime
fields.label: Hide Read/Watch Time
fields.description: If checked, suppresses the display of the read/watch time in the card layout.

fields.name: hideRole
fields.label: Hide Title
fields.description: If checked, suppresses the display of title in the card layout.

fields.name: hideDescription
fields.label: Hide Description
fields.description: If checked, suppresses the display of description in the card layout.

fields.name: hideImage
fields.label: Hide Image
fields.description: If checked, suppresses the display of the image in the card layout.

fields.name: id
fields.label: Id
fields.description: Optional anchor ID for deep linking to this Story Card.

fields.name: customClass
fields.label: Custom Class
fields.description: Optional CSS class names for styling overrides.

fields.name: ctaLabel
fields.label: CTA Text
fields.description: Custom call-to-action label (e.g. "Meet Roopal"). Overrides the default from the story page.

fields.name: analyticsInteractionId
fields.label: Analytics Interaction ID
fields.description: Generated automatically from the block resource path at render time.

fields.name: classes_searchIconType
fields.label: Search Icon Type
fields.description: Controls whether the search field shows no icon, a font icon, or an image icon.

fields.name: searchFontIcon
fields.label: Search Font Icon
fields.description: Font icon name to display for the search input.

fields.name: searchInID
fields.label: Search in ID
fields.description: Enter the ID of the container to search in. If left empty, searches the next sibling list.

fields.name: browseCategories
fields.label: Browse Categories Placeholder Text
fields.description: Default label for the category dropdown. Leave empty to disable.

fields.name: clearCategories
fields.label: Reset Categories Placeholder Text
fields.description: Enter text to enable the clear/reset button. Leave empty to disable.

fields.name: categoryTag
fields.label: Category Tag
fields.description: Tag value used to filter list items (matched against item text content).

fields.name: categoryLink
fields.label: Category Link
fields.description: Page path for this category.

fields.name: categoryTitle
fields.label: Category Title
fields.description: Display title override. If empty, uses the Category Tag value.

fields.name: buttonText
fields.label: Button Text
fields.description: Label displayed on the call-to-action button.

fields.name: buttonURL
fields.label: Button URL
fields.description: Destination link for the call-to-action.

fields.name: clickType
fields.label: Click Type
fields.description: Controls link behavior such as opening in the same tab.

fields.name: ariaLabel
fields.label: Aria Label
fields.description: Defines a concise, descriptive label read by screen readers for the teaser region.

fields.name: blockId
fields.label: ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for this block

fields.name: classes_commonCustomClass
fields.label: Custom Class
fields.description: Custom CSS class to apply to this block

fields.name: analytics_id
fields.label: Analytics Interaction ID
fields.description: Analytics Interaction ID used for tracking interactions with this block.

fields.name: blockId
fields.label: ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for this block

fields.name: classes_commonCustomClass
fields.label: Custom Class
fields.description: Custom CSS class to apply to this block

fields.name: analytics_id
fields.label: Analytics Interaction ID
fields.description: Analytics Interaction ID used for tracking interactions with this block.

fields.name: placeholderAlt
fields.label: Poster Alt Text
fields.description: Provide alt text for the poster image for accessibility.

fields.name: overlayTitle
fields.label: Overlay Title
fields.description: Title displayed on top of the video before the user clicks play.

fields.name: overlayDescription
fields.label: Overlay Description
fields.description: Description displayed on top of the video before the user clicks play.

fields.name: overlayBtnText
fields.label: Overlay Button Text
fields.description: Defines the button text displayed on the video overlay before playback.

fields.name: classes_overlayColor
fields.label: Color Overlay
fields.description: Provide a solid background color that overlays the video before playback begins.

fields.name: overlayButtonIconType
fields.label: Overlay Button Icon Type
fields.description: Select the icon type used in the overlay button

fields.name: overlayButtonFontIcon
fields.label: Overlay Button Font Icon
fields.description: Define the icon font name for the button.

fields.name: projectNumber
fields.label: Project Number
fields.description: Enter the project reference number if applicable.

fields.name: enableAutoplay
fields.label: Enable Autoplay
fields.description: If selected this video will auto play when it comes into the view of the user.

fields.name: enableCaptions
fields.label: Enable Captions
fields.description: If selected captions will be displayed

fields.name: enablePlayerControls
fields.label: Enable Player Controls
fields.description: If selected a video toolbar will be available to the user (play, pause, etc)

fields.label: ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for this block

fields.name: classes_commonCustomClass
fields.label: Custom Class
fields.description: Custom CSS class to apply to this block

fields.name: analytics_id

fields.description: Analytics Interaction ID used for tracking interactions with this block.
